title: Periodically Assess Security Controls in Organizational Systems
description: periodically assess the security controls in organizational systems to determine if the controls are effective in their application

checks.name: The Frequency of Security Control Assessments is Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of the frequency for security control assessments is an organizational GRC documentation concern documented in the security assessment plan and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Security Controls are Assessed with the Defined Frequency
checks.purpose: Performance of periodic security control assessments is an organizational GRC documentation concern requiring assessment records and findings documentation and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: The Frequency of Security Control Assessments is Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of assessment frequency is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Security Controls are Assessed with the Defined Frequency
checks.purpose: Performance of periodic security control assessments is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: The Frequency of Security Control Assessments is Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of assessment frequency is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Security Controls are Assessed with the Defined Frequency
checks.purpose: Performance of periodic security control assessments is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: The Frequency of Security Control Assessments is Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of assessment frequency is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

checks.name: Security Controls are Assessed with the Defined Frequency
checks.purpose: Performance of periodic security control assessments is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Establish and document a security assessment plan defining the frequency of security control assessments. Conduct assessments at the defined frequency using approved assessment procedures and document findings, evidence, and results. Retain assessment records to demonstrate compliance during CMMC assessments.
